full_text:
Zhou Tai (Youping) 周泰 (幼平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Tai (周泰), styledYouping (幼平), was born in Xia Cai, Jiu Jiang district (Presently Fengtai, An Hui Province). Wu officer who Saved Sun Quan’s life, and was loved dearly in return. Zhou Tai was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhou Tai lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
